calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-28-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brent Kato for (administrator) Troy Davis. Richard Grabstein for (former administrator) Janet Davis. Grayling Williams for (heirs) Arthur Jackson, Kissy Walker-Davis & Tarita Walker-Davis who are present in court.

Mr. Williams reported that he was notified that their objection was rejected due to an issue with the way Ms. Walker-Davis was listed on the document, that they are objecting to the petition for final distribution, that Arthur and Shelby are the biological children of Shirley Davis, that they are not being included in the distribution of this estate and that they would like a continuance. Mr. Kato stated that he had advised Mr. Williams of the rejection of his document at the last hearing and that Mr. Williams has had a month to get it filed. Mr. Grabstein stated that there is no basis to continue this matter again. Mr. Williams stated that this has been before the Court for years and that he does not think another 3 weeks will prejudice anything. The Court stated that it will take the petition for final distribution under submission as of November 14, 2016 and that Mr. Williams has one week to submit any additional documents.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-21-2016 Continued To Nov-07-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brent Kato for (petitioner) Troy Davis. Richard Grabstein for Janet Davis. Grayling Williams for (objectors) Arthur Jackson & Kizzy Walker-Davis.

This matter had been pre-granted but was objected to.
The Court confirmed that it has not received the objections and asked about the time frame for a new date. Mr. Kato stated that he would like 3 weeks to file his response and that there may be a need for an evidentiary hearing. Mr. Grabstein stated that he agrees with Mr. Kato and that the objections were insufficient. Mr. Williams stated that the objections were not insufficient under the code, that he represents the children whose mother was the pre-deceased spouse of John Davis. The Court continued the Petition for final distribution to November 7, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204, stated that it will set an evidentiary hearing at that time if needed and that Mr. Williams has until 10/31/16 to file a reply to the response.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Chan. (Not Reported)
